meaning: n.脚趾甲,斜钉下去的钉子
examples: To cure dandruff, you massage the little spot just behind your big toenail.
Toenail nicotine levels were found to be a strong predictor of lung cancer.
All patients undergoing toenail surgery should receive appropriate education regarding postoperative care.
Whatever the procedure needed, from the fixing of an ingrown toenail to an organ transplant, Apollo can deliver.
And I don't know why I do, except perhaps for what we'd named the dolls - toenail and fingernail.
